title: Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (July 2026)
titleZh: 问 HN：你在忙什么？（2026年7月）
author: david927
relevanceReason: Hacker News 的 'What Are You Working On' 月度讨论帖，汇集了大量开发者分享正在进行的科技、编程、开源、AI 等项目，属于科技开发者社区的核心内容聚合。
textRawHtml: What are you working on?  Any new ideas that you're thinking about?
textZhHtml: 你在忙些什么？有什么正在考虑的新想法吗？
summaryZh: Hacker News 2026年7月月度讨论帖，邀请开发者分享当前正在进行的项目和想法。
帖子获得260分、1013条回复，涵盖AI、开源、硬件、云服务等多个科技领域的个人项目展示。
highlightsZh: HN 社区月度项目分享传统栏目，信息密度高
涵盖编程、AI、开源、硬件等多领域一线开发者动态
1013条回复提供大量新兴项目和技术趋势线索
适合发现早期开源项目和创新科技产品灵感

comments.author: BruzWJ
comments.textRawHtml:
I have been working on this project for building personal AI trading systems.

The core idea is using TradingView style alert system as N8N workflow trigger to run analysis and order executions with live market data monitoring.

I personally tried many "AI trading" tools but none of them handle things the way I expect. Most of them run on a schedule based analysis like every 5 minutes or daily, and almost all of the ones perform analysis through a AI black box with no transparency for how the analysis is performed and what data was referenced.

So I ended up making one myself that trigger analysis at more meaningful moments generated by my technical indicators, and run the analysis that I personally configured with inspectable steps and detailed info for better reviews, then tune the workflow to be more reproducible and reliable.

Currently working on a MCP that let Codex or Claude Code be able to edit indicators and workflows, as well as setting up monitors for me. I originally made a Copilot system for this but it's too expensive since it uses API keys to access AI services, would be much cheaper with subscription backed access via MCP :D

I value transparency a lot when it comes to trading analysis, not sure if anyone else feels the same
comments.textZhHtml:
我一直致力于这个项目，用于构建个人人工智能交易系统。

核心思想是使用 TradingView 风格的警报系统作为 N8N 工作流程触发器，通过实时市场数据监控来运行分析和订单执行。

我个人尝试了许多“人工智能交易”工具，但没有一个以我期望的方式处理事情。它们中的大多数都按照基于计划的分析运行，例如每 5 分钟或每天运行一次，并且几乎所有的分析都通过人工智能黑匣子进行分析，对于如何执行分析和引用哪些数据不透明。

因此，我最终自己制作了一个，在我的技术指标生成的更有意义的时刻触发分析，并运行我个人配置的可检查步骤和详细信息以获得更好的审查的分析，然后调整工作流程，使其更加可重复和可靠。

目前正在研究一个 MCP，让 Codex 或 Claude Code 能够编辑指标和工作流程，并为我设置监视器。我最初为此制作了一个 Copilot 系统，但它太贵了，因为它使用 API 密钥来访问 AI 服务，通过 MCP 进行订阅支持的访问会便宜得多：D

在交易分析方面，我非常重视透明度，不确定其他人是否也有同样的感觉

comments.author: cjflog
comments.textRawHtml:
I made Beacon, a mobile app for answering: “which of my friends is free to talk right now?” It’s basically a one-to-many phone call that only one person can answer. Send a beacon to a group, and everyone gets rung at the same time. The first person who answers gets connected for a 1-1 call, and for everyone else the signal drops silently. No missed-calls or pressure to answer. Works pretty well given most people keep their phones on silent (and there are in-app settings for quiet hours too).

It works best if you're able to join with at least four people you don't speak with as much as you'd like. I have a couple dozen connections on the app now, and it feels like magic to me. Would love feedback from both introverts and extroverts who still like phone calls, or wish they had more of them:

iOS TestFlight access here -> https://trybeacon.chat/

Android also in beta here -> https://appdistribution.firebase.dev/i/afe3c44d8443c4c0
comments.textZhHtml:
我制作了 Beacon，一款用于回答“我的哪些朋友现在有空聊天？”的移动应用程序。 这基本上是一对多的电话，只有一个人可以接听。向一组发送一个信标，每个人都会同时响铃。第一个接听电话的人会接通一对一通话，而对于其他人来说，信号会默默下降。没有漏接电话或接听压力。考虑到大多数人都将手机保持静音（并且应用程序内也有安静时间设置），效果非常好。

如果您能够与至少四个您不常交谈的人加入，效果最好。我现在在该应用程序上有几十个连接，这对我来说就像魔法一样。希望仍然喜欢打电话或希望有更多电话的内向者和外向者提供反馈：

iOS TestFlight 访问权限 -> https://trybeacon.chat/

Android 也处于测试阶段 -> https://appdistribution.firebase.dev/i/afe3c44d8443c4c0

children.author: ggitelson
children.textRawHtml: Very interesting. Part of my says that if it rung and I wasn't the first to answer, I would feel bad. At the same time, I like the idea of being able to reach out and just say "I feel like talking to someone". I would imagine that it is super interesting for people with depression or addiction who could add their support group too.
children.textZhHtml: 非常有趣。我的一部分意思是，如果电话响了而我不是第一个接听的，我会感觉很糟糕。同时，我喜欢能够伸出援手并说“我想和某人交谈”。我想这对于患有抑郁症或成瘾的人来说非常有趣，他们也可以添加他们的支持小组。

children.author: cjflog
children.textRawHtml: If you miss a Beacon and that makes you realize you want to chat with a friend, you can just send your own Beacon!
children.textZhHtml: 如果你错过了一个Beacon，并且这让你意识到想和朋友聊聊，你完全可以自己发一个Beacon！

children.author: telesilla
children.textRawHtml: I'd love it if you can also fix the problem of timezones. So many of my friends are oceans-apart and we rarely rarely meet and talk as a group anymore. Maybe some kind of asynchronous option?
children.textZhHtml: 如果您也能解决时区问题，我会很高兴。我的很多朋友远隔重洋，我们很少再聚在一起交谈。也许某种异步选项？

children.author: cjflog
children.textRawHtml:
The idea is to just send a beacon whenever you're free and maybe you'll catch friends in the wildly different timezones from time to time.

I sometimes send beacons on morning commutes. Way too early for normal social calls but will sometimes catch people a few timezones east on a lunch break or something.
children.textZhHtml:
这个想法就是，只要你一有空就发个Beacon，说不定就能时不时联系上那些时区差异巨大的朋友。

我有时会在早晨通勤时发Beacon。那时候打普通社交电话太早了，但有时刚好能联系上东边几个时区正在午休的朋友之类的。

children.author: d1sxeyes
children.textRawHtml: You can’t really have an asynchronous phone call though…
children.textZhHtml: 不过，电话毕竟没法真正异步进行……

children.author: tim-projects
children.textRawHtml:
This makes me think of MSN,AOL or ICQ which had an online status and notification system.

Why did that go away with modern messaging? WhatsApp and signal don't have it. Sms? Not sure. I think Facebook messenger does.

I can remember this was an important feature that everyone actively used.
children.textZhHtml:
这让我想起 MSN、AOL 或 ICQ，它们都有在线状态和通知系统。

为什么现代消息传递系统会消失？ WhatsApp 和 Signal 没有这个功能。短信？没有把握。我认为 Facebook Messenger 可以。

我记得这是每个人都积极使用的一个重要功能。

children.author: cjflog
children.textRawHtml: I think it went away because everyone became "online" all the time, but that also meant most communication transitioned to async
children.textZhHtml: 我觉得它消失是因为每个人都变成全天候“在线”了，但这也意味着大多数交流都转向了异步模式

children.author: conrs
children.textRawHtml: This is an interesting idea. I'm building https://tend2thrive.com - I could see an interesting collaboration here. Always looking for ways to re-engage your network without it feeling heavy.
children.textZhHtml: 这是一个有趣的想法。我正在构建 https://tend2thrive.com - 我可以在这里看到有趣的合作。始终寻找重新连接您的网络而不感到沉重的方法。

children.author: jasondigitized
children.textRawHtml: Curious what the stack looks like.  Are you doing all the heavy lifting yourself with WebRTC or using something like LiveKit?
children.textZhHtml: 好奇堆栈是什么样的。  您是否使用 WebRTC 或 LiveKit 之类的工具自己完成所有繁重的工作？

children.author: boaztheostrich
children.textRawHtml: Ooh this is such a cool idea.
children.textZhHtml: 哦，这是一个很酷的主意。

children.author: andrewrn
children.textRawHtml: Super neat concept. One super low-lift way to improve its reception: change the styling of the landing page to not be blatant AI slop.
children.textZhHtml: 概念非常棒。有一个极其省力的方法可以改善它的接受度：把落地页的样式改一改，别弄得那么像粗制滥造的AI垃圾内容。

children.author: user43928
children.textZhHtml: 不同意，我觉得看起来挺好的。

children.author: gladlabs
children.textRawHtml: what if I don't answer quickly enough but do want to talk :(
children.textZhHtml: 要是我没及时接听但又很想聊天怎么办 :(

children.author: yreg
children.textRawHtml: You fire off a new beacon.
children.textZhHtml: 你发出了一个新的信标。

children.author: Paarthmj
children.textRawHtml: love the idea, would love a messaging version
children.textZhHtml: 很喜欢这个想法，要是有个消息版本就好了

children.author: cjflog
children.textRawHtml: Can you say more about what you mean by a messaging version?
children.textZhHtml: 你能详细说说你所说的消息版本是什么意思吗？
